name: project_overview
content: Bean & Brew is a Go web application for a coffee shop. Architecture: Clean Architecture with 4 layers (entity‚Üírepository‚Üíusecase‚Üíhandler). Tech stack: Go 1.25, chi router, SQLite (in-memory for tests), html/template. The project has 637 test runs across 4 layers: entity unit tests (237 runs), handler API tests (179 runs), usecase tests (127 runs), repository integration tests (94 runs). Test naming convention: TestLevel_Entity_Method (e.g. TestUnitProductValidate, TestIntegrationProductCRUD, TestAPIOrderFlow). All tests use fresh in-memory SQLite databases via setupTestDB(t) or setupTestServer(t) helpers ‚Äî no shared state between tests. Table-driven tests with t.Run() used extensively for parametric coverage.

name: entity_product
content: Product entity: struct with fields ID(int64), CategoryID(int64), Name(string), Description(string), Price(float64), ImageURL(string), InStock(bool), CreatedAt(time.Time), UpdatedAt(time.Time). Methods: Validate() checks Name!="" ‚Üí ErrEmptyName, Price>=0 ‚Üí ErrNegativePrice, CategoryID>0 ‚Üí ErrInvalidCategory (in this priority order). ApplyDiscount(percent float64) returns discounted price; returns original if percent<0 or >100. Tests: TestUnitProductValidate (14 subtests: valid, empty_name, negative_price, zero_price_valid, zero_category, negative_category, very_small_negative_price, large_price, unicode_name, spaces_only, emoji_name, very_long_name, negative_category_large, all_fields_valid_with_description). TestUnitProductApplyDiscount (12 subtests: 0/1/10/33.33/50/99/100 percent, negative returns original, over 100 returns original, tiny 0.01, exactly -0.01, exactly 100.01). TestUnitProductApplyDiscountZeroPrice ‚Äî 50% of 0 = 0. TestUnitProductApplyDiscountLargePrice ‚Äî 25% of 1M = 750000. TestUnitProductValidatePriorityOrder ‚Äî empty name checked before negative price. TestUnitProductValidateNameBeforeCategory ‚Äî empty name before zero category. TestUnitProductValidatePriceBeforeCategory ‚Äî negative price before zero category.

name: entity_product_extended
content: Extended product entity tests: TestUnitProductApplyDiscountVariousPrices (15 subtests: 25% discount applied to prices 0, 1, 10, 50, 99.99, 100, 350, 500, 999, 1000, 5000, 10000, 99999, 0.01, 0.50 ‚Äî verifies multiplied by 0.75). TestUnitProductApplyDiscountBoundaryPercents (10 subtests: boundary values -100, -0.01, 0, 0.01, 49.99, 50, 50.01, 99.99, 100, 100.01 ‚Äî verifies correct handling of negative/over-100 returning original). TestUnitProductValidateFieldCombinations (12 subtests: all valid combos like empty+positive+valid, empty+zero+valid, name+negative+valid, etc. ‚Äî exhaustive matrix of valid/invalid field combinations). TestUnitProductApplyDiscountConsistency ‚Äî applying 50% twice should not mutate the product. TestUnitProductApplyDiscountVerySmallPrice ‚Äî 10% of 0.001 = 0.0009. TestUnitProductValidateDescriptionOptional ‚Äî empty description is valid. TestUnitProductValidateImageURLOptional ‚Äî empty image URL is valid. TestUnitProductValidateInStockDefault ‚Äî InStock=false is valid.

name: entity_order
content: Order entity: struct with ID(int64), CustomerID(string), Status(OrderStatus), Items([]OrderItem), Total(float64), CreatedAt/UpdatedAt(time.Time). OrderStatus constants: new, processing, completed, cancelled. OrderItem: ID, OrderID, ProductID(int64), Quantity(int), Price(float64). Methods: Validate() checks CustomerID!="" ‚Üí ErrEmptyCustomerID, len(Items)>0 ‚Üí ErrEmptyOrder, each item: Quantity>0 ‚Üí ErrInvalidQuantity, ProductID>0 ‚Üí ErrInvalidProduct. CalculateTotal() sums item.Price*item.Quantity, sets o.Total. CanCancel() returns true for new/processing. CanComplete() returns true only for processing. Tests: TestUnitOrderValidate (13 subtests: valid, empty_customer, empty_items, zero_quantity, negative_quantity, invalid_product, negative_product, nil_items, multiple_valid, second_item_invalid_quantity, second_item_invalid_product, large_quantity, unicode_customer). TestUnitOrderCalculateTotal, TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalEmpty, TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalSingleItem, TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalLargeOrder, TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalFloatPrecision, TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalSetsField. TestUnitOrderCanCancel/CanComplete ‚Äî 4 statuses each. TestUnitOrderCanCancelUnknownStatus/CanCompleteUnknownStatus. TestUnitOrderValidatePriorityCustomerFirst.

name: entity_order_extended
content: Extended order entity tests: TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalVariousItemCounts (10 subtests: 1 to 10 items with incrementing prices and quantities ‚Äî verifies correct sum calculation). TestUnitOrderValidateMultipleInvalidItems (8 subtests: various combinations of invalid items in multi-item orders ‚Äî zero qty in second item, negative product in third item, all invalid, mix valid/invalid). TestUnitOrderStatusTransitionMatrix (16 subtests: complete 4√ó4 matrix testing CanCancel and CanComplete for all status combinations new/processing/completed/cancelled ‚Äî verifies full state machine correctness). TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalNilItems ‚Äî nil items slice results in 0 total. TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalMixedPrices ‚Äî items with prices 0.01, 999999.99, 350 with varying quantities. TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalOverwritesPrevious ‚Äî calling CalculateTotal twice with different items overwrites. TestUnitOrderValidateItemsValidationOrder ‚Äî first invalid item determines the error. TestUnitOrderValidateSingleItemAllFields ‚Äî validates all fields of a single valid item.

name: entity_news_category
content: NewsItem entity: ID, Title, Content, Author, PublishedAt, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt. Validate() checks Title!="" ‚Üí ErrEmptyName, Content!="" ‚Üí ErrEmptyContent. Summary(maxRunes int) truncates using []rune for UTF-8 correctness; if maxRunes<=3, no ellipsis. Tests: TestUnitNewsItemValidate (10 subtests). TestUnitNewsItemSummary (6 subtests). TestUnitNewsItemSummaryEmptyContent, SummaryOneChar, SummaryMaxRunesZero/One/Two, SummaryUnicode. Category entity: ID, Name, Slug, Description, SortOrder, CreatedAt. Validate() checks Name!="" ‚Üí ErrEmptyName, Slug!="" ‚Üí ErrEmptySlug. Tests: TestUnitCategoryValidate (11 subtests).

name: entity_news_extended
content: Extended news entity tests: TestUnitNewsItemSummaryVariousLengths (15 subtests: Summary() called with maxRunes from 1 to 200 on long Russian text ‚Äî verifies truncation at correct rune boundaries with '...' suffix). TestUnitNewsItemSummaryMultibyteEdgeCases (8 subtests: CJK characters 'Êó•Êú¨Ë™û„ÉÜ„Çπ„Éà', emoji 'üòÄüéâüçïüé∏', Arabic 'ŸÖÿ±ÿ≠ÿ®ÿß ÿ®ÿßŸÑÿπÿßŸÑŸÖ', Thai 'ý∏™ý∏ßý∏±ý∏™ý∏îý∏µý∏Ñý∏£ý∏±ý∏ö', mixed scripts ‚Äî verifies correct rune-based truncation across all Unicode blocks). TestUnitNewsItemValidateFieldCombinations (9 subtests: all valid/invalid combinations of title and content fields). TestUnitNewsItemSummaryExactBoundary ‚Äî content exactly at maxRunes boundary returns without ellipsis. TestUnitNewsItemSummaryNegativeMaxRunes ‚Äî verifies panic on negative input. TestUnitNewsItemValidateContentPriorityOrder ‚Äî title validated before content. TestUnitCategoryValidateExtended (15 subtests: expanded validation cases including unicode, hyphens, dots, numbers, long names, CJK slugs). TestUnitCategoryValidateNameBeforeSlug ‚Äî validates name before slug. TestUnitCategoryValidateAllFieldsPopulated ‚Äî all fields set is valid.

name: repository_product
content: ProductRepository interface: Create, GetByID, List(categoryID, offset, limit), Update, Delete, Search(query, limit), Count(categoryID). SQLite implementation in sqlite/product.go. Integration tests: TestIntegrationProductCRUD ‚Äî full cycle. TestIntegrationProductList ‚Äî 5 products, pagination. TestIntegrationProductSearch ‚Äî Cyrillic text search. TestIntegrationProductCount ‚Äî count by category. TestIntegrationProductDeleteNotFound, GetByIDNotFound, UpdateNotFound ‚Äî ErrNotFound. TestIntegrationProductSearchNoResults, SearchEmptyDB. TestIntegrationProductListWithOffset ‚Äî 10 products, multi-page verification. TestIntegrationProductListByNonExistentCategory. TestIntegrationProductSearchLimit. TestIntegrationProductUpdateFields. TestIntegrationProductCountAfterDelete.

name: repository_product_extended
content: Extended product repository tests: TestIntegrationProductTimestamps ‚Äî verifies CreatedAt/UpdatedAt auto-set on create. TestIntegrationProductListEmptyDB ‚Äî List returns empty slice. TestIntegrationProductSearchByDescription ‚Äî search matches description text, not just name. TestIntegrationProductMultipleCategories ‚Äî 3 categories with 3/2/4 products, verify counts per category (List + Count). TestIntegrationProductPaginationBoundary (5 subtests: offset=0/limit=3, offset=3/limit=3, offset=9/limit=3, offset=10/limit=3, offset=0/limit=100 ‚Äî boundary pagination for 10 items). TestIntegrationProductSearchSpecialChars ‚Äî search with %, _, ' characters doesn't break SQL. TestIntegrationProductBulkCreate ‚Äî create 20 products, verify count=20. TestIntegrationProductSearchEmptyQuery ‚Äî empty search returns empty. TestIntegrationProductCountEmptyDB ‚Äî count=0 on fresh DB. TestIntegrationProductCountByMultipleCategories (3 subtests: count for each of 3 categories).

name: repository_category
content: CategoryRepository interface: Create, GetByID, GetBySlug, List, Update, Delete. SQLite implementation in sqlite/category.go. List returns ordered by sort_order, name. Integration tests: TestIntegrationCategoryCRUD, GetBySlug, GetBySlugNotFound, GetByIDNotFound, List (sort order), ListEmpty, UpdateNotFound, DeleteNotFound, CreateMultiple (10 cats), UpdateSortOrder.

content: Extended category repository tests: TestIntegrationCategorySlugUpdate ‚Äî update slug then verify old slug returns 404. TestIntegrationCategorySortOrderVerification ‚Äî 5 categories with sort_order 3/1/5/2/4, List returns sorted by sort_order. TestIntegrationCategoryUpdateDescription ‚Äî update description field verified. TestIntegrationCategoryTimestamps ‚Äî CreatedAt auto-set. TestIntegrationCategoryUpdateMultipleFields ‚Äî update name+slug+description+sort_order simultaneously. TestIntegrationCategoryListAfterDelete ‚Äî create 3, delete 1, list returns 2. TestIntegrationCategoryGetAfterDelete ‚Äî deleted category returns ErrNotFound. TestIntegrationCategoryCreateManyAndCount ‚Äî create 15 categories, list returns 15.

name: repository_news
content: NewsRepository interface: Create, GetByID, List(offset, limit), Update, Delete, Count. SQLite implementation. Create auto-sets PublishedAt to now if zero, auto-sets CreatedAt/UpdatedAt. List ordered by published_at DESC. Integration tests: TestIntegrationNewsCRUD, GetByIDNotFound, ListPagination (20 items), ListEmpty, Count (7 items), UpdateNotFound, DeleteNotFound, CreateWithPublishedAt, CreateAutoPublishedAt, ListOrderByPublishedDesc, CountAfterDelete.

TestIntegrationNewsListLargePagination ‚Äî 50 items, page(0,10)=10, page(40,10)=10, page(45,10)=5. TestIntegrationNewsTimestamps ‚Äî CreatedAt/UpdatedAt auto-set on create. TestIntegrationNewsOrderConsistency ‚Äî DESC order by published_at verified across pages.

name: repository_order
content: OrderRepository interface: Create, GetByID, ListByCustomer(customerID, offset, limit), UpdateStatus, GetItems. SQLite implementation creates order + order_items in transaction. GetByID also loads items. Integration tests: TestIntegrationOrderCRUD, StatusTransitions (new‚Üíprocessing‚Üícompleted), ListByCustomer (3 alice + 1 bob), GetNotFound.

name: repository_order_extended
content: Extended order repository tests: TestIntegrationOrderCreateMultipleItems ‚Äî 3 items created, GetItems returns 3. TestIntegrationOrderGetItemsSeparately ‚Äî GetItems(orderID) returns correct items with prices. TestIntegrationOrderListByCustomerPagination ‚Äî 8 orders, page(0,3)=3, page(3,3)=3, page(6,3)=2. TestIntegrationOrderListByCustomerEmpty ‚Äî empty customer returns 0. TestIntegrationOrderListByCustomerNonExistent ‚Äî unknown customer returns 0. TestIntegrationOrderCreateSetsTimestamps ‚Äî CreatedAt/UpdatedAt auto-set. TestIntegrationOrderMultipleCustomers ‚Äî alice(3)+bob(2)+charlie(1), verify per-customer counts. name: usecase_product
content: ProductUseCase: wraps ProductRepository + CategoryRepository. Create validates product then checks category exists. List applies pagination defaults (page=1, pageSize=20). Update validates first. Delete delegates to repo. Search defaults limit to 20. Tests: TestUnitProductUCCreateValidatesCategory, CreateValidatesProduct, CreateValidatesNegativePrice, ListPagination (25 items), ListDefaultPageSize, GetByID, GetByIDNotFound, Update, UpdateValidation, Delete, Search, SearchDefaultLimit, ListByCategory.

name: usecase_product_extended
content: Extended product usecase tests: TestUnitProductUCCreateWithAllFields ‚Äî product with description+image_url+in_stock, verify all fields preserved. TestUnitProductUCUpdateNonExistent ‚Äî update product 999 returns error. TestUnitProductUCDeleteNonExistent ‚Äî delete product 999 returns error. TestUnitProductUCSearchEmpty ‚Äî empty query returns empty. TestUnitProductUCSearchUnicode ‚Äî search Cyrillic text '–õ–∞—Ç—Ç–µ'. TestUnitProductUCListPaginationEdgeCases (8 subtests: page 0 defaults, pageSize 0 defaults, page past end, various page/size combos with 25 items). TestUnitProductUCListEmptyDB ‚Äî empty list on fresh DB. TestUnitProductUCCreateDuplicateName ‚Äî duplicate name allowed (returns 201). TestUnitProductUCSearchNoResults ‚Äî search '–ù–µ—Å—É—â–µ—Å—Ç–≤—É—é—â–∏–π'. TestUnitProductUCCreateAndRetrieve ‚Äî full round-trip verification.

name: usecase_order
content: OrderUseCase: wraps OrderRepository + ProductRepository. Create: validates order, looks up product prices, sets item.Price from product, calls CalculateTotal(), sets status=new. Process: checks status=new ‚Üí ErrInvalidStatus. Cancel: checks CanCancel(). Complete: checks CanComplete() (only processing). ListByCustomer: defaults page=1, pageSize=20. Tests: TestUnitOrderUCCreateSetsPrice (350*3=1050), CreateMultipleItems, CreateInvalidProduct, CreateEmptyCustomer, CreateEmptyItems, GetByID, GetByIDNotFound, ListByCustomer, ListByCustomerPagination, CancelFlow, CancelProcessing, CancelCompleted, CompleteRequiresProcessing, ProcessRequiresNew, FullLifecycle, CancelNotFound/ProcessNotFound/CompleteNotFound.

name: usecase_order_extended
content: Extended order usecase tests: TestUnitOrderUCCreateMultipleItemsSameProduct ‚Äî same product with qty 2+3, total=350*5=1750. TestUnitOrderUCCreateVerifiesEachProduct ‚Äî one valid + one non-existent product returns error. TestUnitOrderUCListByCustomerEmpty ‚Äî unknown customer returns 0. TestUnitOrderUCStatusTransitionMatrix (12 subtests: 3 actions √ó 4 states ‚Äî cancel/process/complete from new/processing/completed/cancelled). TestUnitOrderUCCreateSetsStatusNew ‚Äî verify initial status. TestUnitOrderUCCreateCalculatesCorrectTotal ‚Äî 2 products: –õ–∞—Ç—Ç–µ(350)*2 + –Ý–∞—Ñ(400)*3 = 1900. TestUnitOrderUCCreateSetsItemPricesFromProduct ‚Äî item.Price set from product.Price. TestUnitOrderUCGetByIDWithItems ‚Äî 2 items returned with GetByID. TestUnitOrderUCListByCustomerPaginationEdgeCases (4 subtests: page1/2/3 of 8 items + past end). TestUnitOrderUCFullLifecycleCancel ‚Äî new‚Üíprocess‚Üícancel lifecycle.

name: usecase_news_category
content: NewsUseCase: wraps NewsRepository. Create validates. List defaults page=1, pageSize=10. Update validates. Delete delegates. CategoryUseCase: wraps CategoryRepository. Create/Update validate. GetBySlug/List/Delete delegate. Tests: TestUnitNewsUCCreate, CreateValidationEmptyTitle/EmptyContent, GetByID/GetByIDNotFound, Update, UpdateValidation, Delete, Pagination, PaginationDefaults, CategoryUCCreate, CreateValidationEmptyName/EmptySlug, GetByID/GetBySlug/GetBySlugNotFound, List, Update, UpdateValidation, Delete.

TestAPIProductSearchQueryParams (5 subtests: search, nonexistent, with limit, empty, special chars). TestAPIProductCRUDFullCycle ‚Äî create‚Üíread‚Üíupdate‚Üídelete‚Üíverify gone. content: Order API tests (19 original + 17 extended = 36 tests): Original: TestAPIOrderFlow, EmptyItems, GetByID, GetByIDNotFound, Process, Complete, Cancel, CancelAlreadyCancelled, CompleteWithoutProcess, ListByCustomer, EmptyCustomerID, InvalidJSON, MultipleItems, ProcessNotFound/CancelNotFound/CompleteNotFound, FullLifecycleViaAPI, InvalidProduct. TestAPIOrderProcessInvalidID/CancelInvalidID/CompleteInvalidID/GetInvalidID ‚Äî /orders/abc = 400. TestAPIOrderStatusAfterProcess/Complete/Cancel ‚Äî verify status via GET after action. TestAPIOrderDoubleProcess ‚Äî process twice = 400. TestAPIOrderProcessCompleted ‚Äî process after complete = 400. TestAPIOrderCancelCompleted ‚Äî cancel after complete = 400. TestAPIOrderCreateVerifiesTotal (4 subtests: qty 1/3/5/10 √ó price 350). TestAPIOrderCRUDFullCycle ‚Äî create‚ÜíGET‚Üíprocess‚Üícomplete‚Üíverify status=completed.

name: api_helpers_and_infrastructure
content: TestAPIResponseContentType ‚Äî verifies Content-Type: application/json on list endpoints. TestAPIErrorResponseFormat ‚Äî verifies error responses have {'error': '...'} structure. Helper functions: setupTestServer(t) creates httptest.Server with full handler stack (all 4 handlers + chi router), postJSON(url, body) marshals and posts, putJSON for PUT, doDelete for DELETE, decodeBody reads response JSON, createCategory/createProduct/createNewsItem/createTestOrderAPI convenience helpers. All tests isolated via fresh in-memory SQLite. writeError() maps entity errors to HTTP status codes: ErrNotFound‚Üí404, validation errors‚Üí400, ErrAlreadyExists‚Üí409.

name: test_infrastructure
content: Test infrastructure pattern: setupTestDB(t) in testhelper_test.go opens :memory: SQLite, runs RunMigrations, registers db.Close() as t.Cleanup. seedCategory(t, repo) creates default '–¢–µ—Å—Ç–æ–≤–∞—è/test-cat' category. setupTestServer(t) creates full server stack: 4 repos + 4 usecases + 4 handlers + chi router ‚Üí httptest.NewServer. setupUC(t) returns all 4 use cases with shared in-memory DB. seedCatAndProduct(t, productUC, categoryUC) creates default '–ö–æ—Ñ–µ/coffee' category and '–õ–∞—Ç—Ç–µ' product (price=350). setupOrderTestData(t, db) creates category+product and returns IDs for order tests. createTestOrder(t, repo, catID, prodID, customerID) convenience for order repo tests. All test functions start with fresh database ‚Äî no test pollution.

name: test_patterns_and_coverage
content: Coverage by layer: Entity layer ‚Äî 237 test runs (Product: validate 14+15+12+5 subtests, discount 12+15+10+3, Order: validate 13+8 subtests, total 10+5, transitions 16, News: validate 10+9, summary 15+8+6, Category: validate 11+15+3). Repository layer ‚Äî 94 test runs (Product: 14 original + 12 extended, Category: 10+8, News: 11+10, Order: 4+13). Usecase layer ‚Äî 127 test runs (Product: 13+12, Order: 19+14, News: 10+14, Category: 9+13). API handler layer ‚Äî 179 test runs (Product: 16+12 extended with 12+6+5 subtests, Category: 10+14 extended with 12+3 subtests, News: 12+15 extended with 12+6+3 subtests, Order: 19+17 extended with 10+4 subtests). Table-driven tests with t.Run() used extensively across all layers.

name: known_issues_and_flaky_analysis
content: TestIntegrationProductSearch is potentially flaky: uses LIKE queries with Cyrillic text, behavior may vary across SQLite versions; depends on insert order. TestUnitNewsItemSummary was previously buggy ‚Äî used len() instead of []rune for UTF-8 string truncation, now fixed. TestAPIProductSearchNoResults required nil-safe type assertion ‚Äî products key can be null JSON array when Search returns nil slice, fixed with comma-ok assertion. The Go/SQLite search uses case-insensitive LIKE which works for ASCII but may not work correctly for all Unicode characters. TestUnitOrderCalculateTotalFloatPrecision uses tolerance check (¬±0.1) because IEEE 754 float arithmetic for 0.1*10+0.2*5 is not exactly 2.0. TestUnitProductApplyDiscount for 33.33% uses tolerance (¬±0.1). TestUnitNewsItemSummaryNegativeMaxRunes panics on negative input (slice bounds out of range) ‚Äî expected behavior, test verifies panic with recover(). TestAPICategoryCreateDuplicateSlug returns 500 (SQLite UNIQUE constraint error) ‚Äî not mapped to a specific HTTP error code.

name: error_handling_map
content: Error to HTTP status mapping in handler/helpers.go writeError(): ErrNotFound‚Üí404, ErrEmptyName‚Üí400, ErrEmptySlug‚Üí400, ErrEmptyContent‚Üí400, ErrNegativePrice‚Üí400, ErrInvalidCategory‚Üí400, ErrInvalidProduct‚Üí400, ErrInvalidQuantity‚Üí400, ErrEmptyCustomerID‚Üí400, ErrEmptyOrder‚Üí400, ErrInvalidStatus‚Üí400, ErrAlreadyExists‚Üí409, all other errors‚Üí500. This is tested indirectly through API tests that verify correct status codes for each error type. The entity/errors.go defines all 12 sentinel errors. Tests verify validation order: Validate() checks are sequential ‚Äî first failing check determines the returned error.

name: order_state_machine
content: Order status transitions: new‚Üíprocessing (Process), processing‚Üícompleted (Complete), new‚Üícancelled (Cancel), processing‚Üícancelled (Cancel). Invalid transitions return ErrInvalidStatus: completed‚Üícancelled, cancelled‚Üíanything, new‚Üícompleted (must process first), processing‚Üíprocessing (already processing). Tested at 3 layers: entity (CanCancel/CanComplete methods + full 4√ó4 status transition matrix), usecase (Process/Cancel/Complete with GetByID‚Üícheck‚ÜíUpdateStatus + 12-subtest action√óstate matrix), API (POST /orders/{id}/process|complete|cancel returning 200 or 400 + status verification via GET). TestUnitOrderUCFullLifecycle, TestUnitOrderUCFullLifecycleCancel, and TestAPIOrderCRUDFullCycle test complete happy paths with status verification at each step.
